examples: His love was a mere sham; what he really wanted was her money.
To take sides at a later point would be to suggest that the earlier presumptive impartiality was a sham.
Their promises turned out to be full of sham and hypocrisy.
Money manager Mario Gabelli faces a suit for allegedly putting in sham bids at auctions of wireless spectrum.
The AMP (area mail processing) studies are a sham and the process is entirely perfunctory.
